metric_definitions.matching: detection within max(1.5 px, 0.5 x truth_fwhm); greedy in descending truth flux; each truth star matches at most once (docs/FIXTURES.md)
metric_definitions.snr: truth peak SNR is PER-CHANNEL (D-017); the measured mean-of-RGB plane has sqrt(3) better SNR, so snr=5 is ~8.7 sigma in the data actually measured
metric_definitions.recall_at_snr_floor: matched truth stars with snr >= floor / all truth stars with snr >= floor
metric_definitions.precision: detections matched to any truth star / all detections
metric_definitions.precision_strict: detections matched to a truth star with snr >= floor / all detections
metric_definitions.centroid_error_px: euclidean distance between matched detection and truth position
metric_definitions.fwhm_rel_error: |measured_fwhm - truth_fwhm| / truth_fwhm over matched pairs with a usable fit
metric_definitions.fwhm_rel_bias: median signed (measured - truth)/truth: sign shows whether moments over- or under-estimate
